nurture: Use labels to express domain, product area, and experiment flags.
Prefer a small, stable set of labels reused across units.

directives.description: Guidance for choosing pipeline metadata labels.

nurture: Classify pipelines conservatively as high criticality when they can impact money, data integrity, or compliance.
Use medium for user-facing but recoverable behavior, and low for purely diagnostic flows.
Prefer imperative verbs for behavior-oriented units.

directives.description: Naming guidance for logical processing units.

nurture: Avoid implementation details such as specific libraries.

directives.description: Content guidance for unit business logic.
